title: UDR (UDR) Intrinsic Value — Gemini 3.1 DCF Analysis
description: UDR, Inc. is a leading multifamily real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on managing, buying, selling, developing, and redeveloping attractive real estate properties in targeted U.S. markets. Its portfolio spans both coastal and Sunbelt regions, primarily offering luxury apartment communities.

assumptions.revenueGrowth: 3.5% - Projected average annual growth rate, reflecting a near-term slowdown due to supply deliveries, followed by stabilization.
assumptions.terminalGrowthRate: 2.5% - Assumes perpetual growth slightly above inflation, driven by persistent long-term housing shortages.
assumptions.discountRate: 7.5% - Derived using CAPM, incorporating a low beta of 0.69, reflecting the defensive, yield-generating nature of multifamily real estate.
